author: Kevin Ahrendt
_notes: Local copy of okay_nabu — upstream manifest has tensor_arena_size: 26080,
which is not enough for our build of esp-tflite-micro 1.3.3 on ESP32-S3.
TFLite's AllocateTensors fragments the arena and a 19472-byte intermediate
buffer can't fit. Tried 60000 — failed with byte-identical numbers. Now at
90000 (next probe step). If still fragmenting, the bound is internal-RAM
supply, not arena size, and we need to free more DRAM (e.g. drop API SSL
or shrink mbedtls). probability_cutoff also pre-set to voice-pe's
'slightly sensitive' value (0.56) so we don't override at YAML level.
